data.title: Beacon Roofing’s digital sales surge as it rejects QXO takeover bid
data.description: By the end of Q4, digital transactions accounted for 16% of total sales, a 200-basis point improvement over the prior year, primarily driven by strong demand from residential customers.

data.title: Alibaba partners with Maersk to offer logistics services
data.description: According to Alibaba.com, many of its business buyers are SMEs that often encounter challenges such as unclear pricing and complex logistics.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why the Nike vs. Fanatics competition is heating up in apparel
data.description: While Nike's ecommerce sales remained higher than Fanatics's web sales in 2024, their trend lines are converging, setting up 2025 as an important year.

data.title: Technology vendor commercetools confirms layoffs, restructurings
data.description: The layoffs, affecting dozens of employees, took place over the past few weeks and were accompanied by executive leadership changes, according to industry sources including TechCrunch, OpenTools.com, and TrueUp.io.

data.title: LG Electronics targets 60% growth in U.S. B2B market
data.description: LG underscored the acceleration of its B2B operations as a key component of its transformation, with projections that B2B sales will make up 45% of total revenue by the end of the decade.
